response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in full-stack development, geospatial data processing (GISCollective), and low-latency systems (Dunnhumby), but lacks direct experience with C++ or Rust in routing/navigation systems. His recent roles have focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and AI-agent infrastructure, which are not core to the role. However, his open-source GIS work and system optimization experience (e.g., pricing algorithms, real-time metadata handling) show potential. A closer look at his C++/Rust adaptability and problem-solving approach for routing-specific challenges is needed.
strengths: Strong geospatial data processing experience (GISCollective, Green Map Association)
Proven ability to optimize systems for performance and low latency (Dunnhumby, pricing algorithms at Optilyz)
Diverse technical background with experience in C/C++ (National Instruments) and D language (geospatial work)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ or Rust in production routing/navigation systems
Recent roles heavily skewed toward TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure, not core routing pipelines
No explicit mention of distributed systems, fault tolerance, or service discovery in routing contexts
